text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmed47 minutes agoReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by MtBeautyGeorge on47 minutes ago8 hours agoBiomedhiker1said:One huge advantage of hiring Iraola is that when he was preparing his Bournemouth teams to face Liverpool, he must have watched a lot of tapes of the players who are in the squad and so already knows a lot about the players he will be coaching. I hope Iraola has a lot more influence on the players to keep and players to sign for the upcoming season. It's important that the club assembles a squad that fits with Iraola's tactics, rather than just buying players with potential or players who are great in their positions but not suited to the manager's way of playing.Basing my reply on nothing, but I somehow get the sense that he will be, or has already been, given that influence.
